scripts.build: pnpm run build:app && pnpm run build:maps:leaflet && pnpm run build:maps:maplibre && pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:layers && pnpm run build:until && pnpm run build:l7-core
scripts.lint: eslint .storybook src packages/core/src packages/maps/src packages/storybook/src vite.config.js packages/core/vite.config.js packages/maps/vite.config.js --ext .js,.jsx
scripts.lint:fix: eslint .storybook src packages/core/src packages/maps/src packages/storybook/src vite.config.js packages/core/vite.config.js packages/maps/vite.config.js --ext .js,.jsx --fix
